title: Review Contract Console
concept: A responsive tabbed Playground console that treats Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import as launch contracts with inputs, validation, progress, and resulting active Playground identity.
focus: distinct browser and local-directory save consequences
flows: Preview a WordPress PR or Gutenberg branch end to end with route-specific input, validation, progress, active path mutation, preview identity update, and save/export availability.
Delete a saved Playground end to end with warning, cancel support, confirmation, progress, final row removal, transfer history, and active fallback to an Unsaved Playground when needed.

Save the active temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination copy, permission/reconnect consequence, file-copy progress, shell title mutation, storage badge update, and saved row insertion.

Use Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs while keeping Homepage, WP Admin, path input, refresh, temporary/saved/local state, Save, reset/reload, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip visible.

Browse an honestly labeled representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with categories/search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, editor, copy, download, run, validation, replacement result, and database/preview mutation.
Run portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and Blueprint bundles with result history tied to the same active Playground.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch name
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 6 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved, local-directory, and unsaved Playground list
Open, manage, rename, and delete saved Playgrounds
Delete confirmation with cancel, progress, final row removal, and active fallback
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory storage badges and reset/reload differences
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive Apply Settings & Reset Playground and stored Save & Reload behavior
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, discard, and result state
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, run, replacement warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty, notice, and warning states
Export to GitHub
Download active Playground as .zip
GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history for route previews, saves, rename, delete, file edits, database downloads, Blueprint runs, GitHub actions, ZIP actions, reset, and reload
